persona: Chief of Staff to the CEO of a 4000-person multinational; quarterly exec pulse in en/es/zh/ja
prompt_to_designer: Personalized email to 120 VPs+. Detect their preferred language from the HR system. Voice interview in that language. One-page merged exec summary that survives Legal review.
expected_outline_topics: one thing you'd unblock if you were CEO for a day

sample_answers.text: En LATAM el pipeline de enterprise se duplicó tras el rebrand. Estamos sobreejecutando en ese segmento.
亚太的招聘周期太长了 — 从offer到入职平均要75天,竞争对手是45天.
I'd unblock the procurement approval bottleneck for anything under $50K. It's killing velocity.
日本市場のQ+1の見通しは3.5。円安リスクが大きい。

expected_themes: LATAM enterprise pipeline is over-executing post-rebrand
APAC hiring cycle 30 days behind competitors
procurement bottleneck under $50K is a cross-region complaint
Japan market Q+1 confidence tempered by FX risk
STT/TTS quality parity across 4 languages is non-negotiable for exec trust
